ddls:
CREATE TABLE "signals" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Type of signal */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Category of signal */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the signal */,
  "input_real" REAL /* Real part of the input signal */,
  "input_imaginary" REAL /* Imaginary part of the input signal */,
  "output_real" REAL /* Real part of the output signal */,
  "output_imaginary" REAL /* Imaginary part of the output signal */,
  "magnitude" REAL /* Magnitude of the signal */,
  "phase" REAL /* Phase of the signal */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the signal */,
  "processing_status" TEXT /* Processing status of the signal */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the signal was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the signal was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signals_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES signal_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signals_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signals_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the signal type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the signal type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the signal */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the signal was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the signal was accessed */,
  "access_user_agent" TEXT /* User agent used to access the signal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "processing_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each processing log */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal being processed */,
  "processing_status" TEXT /* Processing status of the signal */,
  "processed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the signal was processed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_processing_logs_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_comments_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal being tagged */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_tags_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id")
)
